description_long: This is a rectangular, countertop microwave oven with a predominantly light gray exterior. The front features a large, dark mesh window set into the door, allowing visibility into the cooking chamber, and a control panel on the right side with a digital display and a grid of labeled buttons. The microwave has a small, rectangular door handle integrated into the lower right corner of the door, designed for easy gripping. Branding is visible on the lower left of the door, and a signature is present on the lower right, adding a touch of personalization. The top, sides, and back are plain and unadorned, with no visible vents or additional features. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or other urban environments.
description: A modern, rectangular microwave oven with a large front window, digital control panel, and integrated door handle. The exterior is light gray with visible branding and a signature on the door.
description_view_0: The back of the microwave is plain and featureless, showing a smooth, light gray surface with a slight notch on the top right edge.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large mesh window, digital control panel with multiple buttons, integrated door handle, and visible branding and signature.
description_view_2: The left side of the microwave is plain and unadorned, with a small portion of the door and handle visible at the front edge.
description_view_3: The top of the microwave is flat and smooth, with no visible features except a slight notch near the back right corner.
attribute_brand_logo: A 'Georgian' brand logo is present on the lower left corner of the door, featuring blue and green text and iconography. The logo is small and unobtrusive.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located on the right side of the front face, featuring a digital display at the top, followed by a vertical arrangement of labeled rectangular buttons in a grid pattern. The panel includes numeric keys, function buttons, and a start/stop button, with clear labeling and a clean layout.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a small, rectangular protrusion integrated into the lower right corner of the door. It is horizontally oriented, made of plastic, and designed for easy gripping and pulling.
attribute_vent_placement: No visible vents or ventilation openings are present on the exterior surfaces of the microwave.
attribute_window_presence: A large, rectangular, semi-transparent mesh window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface and allowing visibility into the interior.
